overview: Libtasn1 could be made to crash if it received specially crafted input.
description:
It was discovered that Libtasn1 incorrectly handled decoding ASN.1 content.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Libtasn1 to crash,
resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2025-13151)

It was discovered that Libtasn1 incorrectly handled encoding ASN.1 content.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Libtasn1 to crash,
resulting in a denial of service. This issue only affected Ubuntu 22.04
LTS. (CVE-2021-46848)

 

 

 

It was discovered that Libtasn1 incorrectly handled decoding ASN.1 content.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Libtasn1 to crash,
resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2025-13151)

An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Libtasn1 to crash,
resulting in a denial of service. This issue only affected Ubuntu 22.04
LTS. (CVE-2021-46848)
full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-7954-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-7954-1: Libtasn1 vulnerabilities

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
12 January 2026

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
Libtasn1 could be made to crash if it received specially crafted input.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 25.10

 25.04

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 libtasn1-6 - Library to manage ASN.1 structures
 

 

 
Details

 

 

It was discovered that Libtasn1 incorrectly handled decoding ASN.1 content.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Libtasn1 to crash,
resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2025-13151)

It was discovered that Libtasn1 incorrectly handled encoding ASN.1 content.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Libtasn1 to crash,
resulting in a denial of service. This issue only affected Ubuntu 22.04
LTS. (CVE-2021-46848)

 

 

 

It was discovered that Libtasn1 incorrectly handled decoding ASN.1 content.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Libtasn1 to crash,
resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2025-13151)

It was discovered that Libtasn1 incorrectly handled encoding ASN.1 content.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Libtasn1 to crash,
resulting in a denial of service. This issue only affected Ubuntu 22.04
LTS. (CVE-2021-46848)

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 25.10

questing

 libtasn1-6 – 

4.20.0-2ubuntu0.25.10.1

 

 25.04

plucky

 libtasn1-6 – 

4.20.0-2ubuntu0.25.04.1

 

 24.04

LTS noble

 libtasn1-6 – 

4.19.0-3ubuntu0.24.04.2

 

 22.04

LTS jammy

 libtasn1-6 – 

4.18.0-4ubuntu0.2
